title: Highlights email in one language
excerpt:
Hello! 
Right now we are receiving our higlights email in a mixte of french and english. We will be very grateful if we can only have the email in one language. Just in french for example! 
Thank you!

posts.author: kagar (Karine Garon)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
Right now we are receiving our higlights email in a mixte of french and english. We will be very grateful if we can only have the email in one language. Just in french for example!

Thank you!

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @kagar ,

Welcome to the monday community!

While I believe it is not possible to do this natively with monday’s capabilities, you should research Bitskout’s capabilities, which is a no/low code AI app with many capabilities.

Bitskout App

Otherwise, you can set up something by using Make.com in addition to an AI platform like ChatGPT.

Hope this helps!

Best,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com
